header.title: Customer Service
header.subtitle: If you have any questions, feel free to contact us anytime.

1.question: How long does delivery take?
1.answer: On average, delivery is completed within 2-3 days. Remote/island areas may take an additional 1-2 days.

2.question: Where can I track my delivery?
2.answer: Check real-time delivery status in My Page > Orders/Delivery. We also send delivery notifications to the contact you provided at checkout.

3.question: How do I exchange or return an item?
3.answer: You can request an exchange/return within 7 days of delivery from My Page > Orders/Delivery. Return shipping costs may apply for change-of-mind returns.

4.question: When will I get my refund?
4.answer: After the returned item arrives at our warehouse and is inspected, refunds are processed within 1-2 days. The refund time may vary depending on the payment method.

5.question: How do I withdraw my membership?
5.answer: You can withdraw at My Page > Edit Profile > Withdraw. All accumulated points and coupons will be forfeited.

6.question: What payment methods are available?
6.answer: We support credit/debit card, real-time bank transfer, virtual account, KakaoPay, NaverPay, TossPay, and more.

7.question: How do I use my points?
7.answer: Points can be used at checkout. They are available from 1,000 KRW, with restrictions on some products.

8.question: When will out-of-stock items be restocked?
8.answer: Restock schedules vary by product. You can request a restock alert on the product detail page to be notified.

inquiry.footerNotice: Hours: Weekdays 09:00 - 18:00 (closed weekends/holidays) | We respond in order, taking up to 3 business days.
inquiry.successDesc: We will respond within 3 business days.
